primaryMetric: graph_multihop Recall@2 minus vector_only Recall@2 (paired per question)
criticalFailures: datasets_not_run: HotpotQA / 2Wiki / MuSiQue have not been downloaded or evaluated
no_effect_ci: the paired graph-minus-vector recall lift has no measured CI yet
decontam_not_run: question-vs-training-corpus disjointness has not been asserted on the real datasets
entity_backend_is_floor: only the deterministic proper-noun extractor exists; the real NER/LLM backend is unwired
provenanceNote: third-party web paragraphs are unlabeled, so provenance-faithfulness is NOT part of this experiment; the wiki/-only faithfulness result lives in eval/okf_recall (tools/eval_okf_recall.py).
honestBound: Harness + synthetic-fixture wiring are validated offline; NO third-party number is claimed. Tracked in the failure ledger: okf-multihop-recall-lift-not-shown-firstparty-2026-06-29.
